vars.name: DATABASE_URL
vars.purpose: Postgres connection (Prisma)

vars.name: JWT_ACCESS_SECRET
vars.purpose: Sign/verify JWT access tokens

vars.name: JWT_REFRESH_SECRET
vars.purpose: Sign/verify JWT refresh tokens

vars.name: BULKSMS_API_TOKEN
vars.purpose: BulkSMSNigeria Bearer token (OtpSender + MessageSender)

vars.name: PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY
vars.purpose: Paystack API (banks, resolve, subaccount, transaction init)

vars.name: PAYSTACK_WEBHOOK_SECRET
vars.purpose: Verify Paystack webhook signatures

vars.name: APPLE_IAP_SHARED_SECRET
vars.purpose: Apple receipt verification

vars.name: GOOGLE_PLAY_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON
vars.purpose: Google Play receipt verification

vars.name: LLM_PROVIDER_API_KEY
vars.purpose: Legacy alias for GEMINI_API_KEY (fallback if GEMINI_API_KEY unset)

vars.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
vars.purpose: Google Gemini API key (voice parse via generateContent). Absent -> StubLlmProvider

vars.name: GEMINI_MODEL
vars.purpose: Gemini model id; default gemini-3.5-flash (current stable Flash)

vars.name: BULKSMS_SENDER_ID
vars.purpose: BulkSMS Nigeria sender name (<=11 chars, 'from'); default OweMe

vars.name: PAYMENT_PROVIDER
vars.purpose: Payment backend selector: 'paystack' (default) | 'flutterwave'

vars.name: FLUTTERWAVE_SECRET_KEY
vars.purpose: Flutterwave v3 secret key (banks/resolve/subaccounts/payments). Used when PAYMENT_PROVIDER=flutterwave

vars.name: FLUTTERWAVE_WEBHOOK_SECRET_HASH
vars.purpose: Flutterwave dashboard secret hash, compared to the verif-hash webhook header

vars.name: GOOGLE_PLAY_PACKAGE_NAME
vars.purpose: Android application id for Play Developer API purchase lookups (e.g. com.oweme.app)

vars.name: JWT_ACCESS_TTL
vars.purpose: Access-token lifetime (e.g. 15m); consumed by auth signing

vars.name: JWT_REFRESH_TTL
vars.purpose: Refresh-token lifetime (e.g. 30d); consumed by auth signing

vars.name: PORT
vars.purpose: HTTP listen port (main.ts; default 3000)

vars.name: ADMIN_JWT_SECRET
vars.purpose: Sign/verify ADMIN access tokens. Distinct from the app's JWT secrets by design; boot throws in production if unset

vars.name: ADMIN_JWT_REFRESH_SECRET
vars.purpose: Sign/verify ADMIN refresh tokens; boot throws in production if unset

vars.name: ADMIN_DASHBOARD_ORIGINS
vars.purpose: Comma-separated CORS allow-list for the admin dashboard origin(s). Never a wildcard. Default http://localhost:3100

vars.name: ADMIN_SEED_EMAIL
vars.purpose: Email for the first superadmin created by the seed command; refuses if any AdminUser exists

vars.name: ADMIN_SEED_PASSWORD
vars.purpose: Password for the first superadmin

vars.name: ADMIN_SEED_NAME
vars.purpose: Display name for the first superadmin

vars.name: SMS_ROUTE_COST_KOBO
vars.purpose: Per-SMS cost estimate recorded on usage events for the cost panels; documented constant, not billing truth

note: Accumulated at reconciliation from declarations + conventions; build agents append any others they introduce.
